html:
NormalBurning

LogsВ are basic building materials with multiple purposes. They can be Refined into Boards, which opens up more recipes.

Logs are dropped from Evergreens, Mushtrees, Cave Banana Trees and Birchnut TreesВ after cutting the trees with anВ Axe. The larger the Tree, the more logs are dropped.В There are three evergreen tree sizes, which yield 1, 2 or 3 logs depending on the size.

Tree StumpsВ from cut Evergreens and Mushtrees can be dug using a ShovelВ to get one extra log. Spiky Trees can also be cut with a chance of getting a log and another one when dug up. Mining full Tall Stalagmites may also yield a log.

In Werebeaver form, Woodie can eat Logs to replenish his Log meter.

Logs can be crafted by Wilson at the cost of 3 Twigs as long as he has the Transmutation skill.

Gallery

  • Original HD icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.
  • Unused artwork for a Diseased Log in Don't Starve Together.
  • Log on the ground
  • Log on the ground in the Shipwrecked DLC
  • Rainforest Log on the ground in the Hamlet DLC
  • Unused Teatree Log on the ground in the Hamlet DLC

вЂњJust a burning log.вЂќ

вЂњIT IS AFLAMEвЂќ

вЂњOh no! Don't put another log on the fire!вЂќ
вЂ“Woodie
вЂњWell. That was fun while it lasted.вЂќ
вЂ“Maxwell
вЂњFlaming lГ¶g!вЂќ

вЂњSo much for our arts and crafts!вЂќ

вЂњSoon it won't be good for much.вЂќ

вЂњAAAHHHHHH!вЂќ
вЂ“Wormwood
вЂњI coulda built something with that.вЂќ
вЂ“Winona
вЂњOh I say, it'll burn away!вЂќ
вЂ“Wortox
вЂњCampfire!вЂќ
вЂ“Wurt
вЂњDoing what logs do.вЂќ
вЂ“Walter
вЂњThat seems like a good use for a log.вЂќ
вЂ“Wanda
LogsВ are basic building materials with multiple purposes. They can be Refined into Boards, which opens up more recipes.
Logs are dropped from Evergreens, Mushtrees, Cave Banana Trees and Birchnut TreesВ after cutting the trees with anВ Axe. The larger the Tree, the more logs are dropped.В There are three evergreen tree sizes, which yield 1, 2 or 3 logs depending on the size.
Tree StumpsВ from cut Evergreens and Mushtrees can be dug using a ShovelВ to get one extra log. Spiky Trees can also be cut with a chance of getting a log and another one when dug up. Mining full Tall Stalagmites may also yield a log.
